summary: Critical infrastructure issue identified: External URL not accessible due to environment hibernation. Backend APIs working 100% locally but external access blocked. Unable to test frontend SEO implementation due to infrastructure issue. Previous SEO bug remains untested.

critical_bugs.issue: External URL https://site-to-app-move-3.preview.emergentagent.com returns 404 for all /api/* routes
critical_bugs.root_cause: Environment appears to be in hibernation state - shows 'Ready to start your preview' page with 'Wake up servers' button
critical_bugs.impact: Complete external API access failure - frontend cannot communicate with backend

infrastructure_issues.symptoms: External URL shows loading page instead of React app, API calls return 404

critical_bugs.issue: Frontend not accessible via external URL - shows hibernation page instead of React app
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot test SEO implementation, forms, or any frontend functionality

critical_bugs.issue: Previous iterations identified Helmet component not applying service-specific meta tags - unable to verify if fixed
critical_bugs.status: UNRESOLVED - Cannot test due to infrastructure issue

passed_tests: Backend Services Running - All supervisor services active
API Response Format - Proper JSON responses with success messages
action_item_for_main_agent:
CRITICAL INFRASTRUCTURE ISSUE: External URL https://site-to-app-move-3.preview.emergentagent.com is not accessible - shows hibernation page instead of React app. All backend APIs return 404 externally but work 100% locally. Need to:
1. Fix environment hibernation/wake-up mechanism
2. Verify proxy/ingress routing for /api/* endpoints
3. Ensure frontend is properly served on external URL
4. Once infrastructure is fixed, re-test SEO implementation from previous iterations

Backend code is working perfectly - this is purely an infrastructure/deployment issue.
